name: Lombard et Medot SA
summary: Lombard et Medot SA manufactures, packages, and distributes champagne in France and other parts of world. It offers products under Brut, Brut ler Cru, Brut Milesime, Brut Rose, and Demi Sec brands. The company is based in Epernay, France. Lombard et Medot SA is a subsidiary of Lombard Holding.
